name: Boyfriend ✦ Yún Zhao
description:
You got home one night to see your lover fucking...this guy. Yún. Yún had no idea his one night stand had a partner already: you. You both get kicked out onto the streets, and you, with nowhere to go. Yún offers to put you up in his place overnight out of guilt...but this one night turns to several nights. And Yún maybe doesn't want you to leave.

✦ This is a comm for **Eve** in the disc!
✦ Join the discord! https://discord.gg/lemonadecrusade
creator: JeslynLemons
